Appearance

SproutDocumentation

Build, review, and master flashcards directly inside your Obsidian workflow.

Start with Installation
Explore on GitHub

Workflow-first docs

Follow the same card lifecycle as the plugin: setup, create, review, maintain.

Built for real decks

Learn practical patterns for cloze, IO, MCQ, and ordered-question workflows.

System-level mastery

Understand FSRS scheduling, analytics, backups, and long-term deck health.

Highlights ​

Structured Guides

Browse documentation grouped by the same categories used in the in-app Obsidian guide.

Practical Workflows

Move from installation to card creation, review sessions, and maintenance without guesswork.

Study System Depth

Learn FSRS scheduling, analytics interpretation, and long-term deck hygiene strategies.

What You Can Do With Sprout ​

Capture Cards Fast

Create basic, cloze, image occlusion, multiple-choice, and ordered-question cards directly in notes.

Review With FSRS

Run focused sessions with FSRS scheduling, grading outcomes, and controls for bury, suspend, and practice mode.

Track Progress Clearly

Use analytics and charts to monitor workload, retention, and review trends as your decks evolve.

Stay Synced and Safe

Import and export with Anki, keep backups clean, and troubleshoot sync confidently with maintenance guides.

Documentation Home ​

Start with Installation, then continue to Creating Cards and Study Sessions.
